basic_details.job_title: CSMCARI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Yoga Therapist and Junior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Captain Srinivasamurthy Central Ayurveda Research Institute
basic_details.short_information: Captain Srinivasamurthy Central Ayurveda Research Institute (CSCARI) has published the Yoga Therapist, JRF Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. 02/2026 on its official website https://ccras.nic.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 Yoga Therapist and Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions on a project basis. Candidates with a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy or M.Sc. in Biotechnology/Microbiology are eligible to attend the walk-in interviews. The maximum age limit for the JRF post is 28 years (as per the notification). The walk-in interviews are scheduled for 09 July 2026 (Yoga The

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 28 years for JRF
age_limit.details: JRF: Not more than 28 years (Age relaxation as per GOI rules). Yoga Therapist: Age limit not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy, M.Sc. Biotechnology/Microbiology
qualification.details: Yoga Therapist: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognized University and two years' experience in Yoga Therapy in a reputed Institute/ Hospital OR Any Graduate from a recognized University established under UGC Act with diploma in Yoga after graduation of at least one-year duration from a recognized University/ Institute with 55% marks and practical experience in Yoga in a reputed Yoga Institute/ Hospital for a minimum period of five years. Level II (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB. Demonstration skills in Yogic practices, for which skill test will be conducted. JRF: M.Sc. Biotechnology/ Microbiology from a recognized University/ Institution.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 38000/- per month Consolidated (Yoga Therapist), Rs. 37000/- per month + HRA as Admissible (JRF)
salary_details.details: Yoga Therapist: Rs. 38000/- per month Consolidated JRF: Rs. 37000/- per month + HRA as Admissible.

selection_process: Written test Interview Skill test (for Yoga Therapist)

rows.captain_srinivasamurthy_central_ayurveda: Rs. 38000/- per month Consolidated (Yoga Therapist), Rs. 37000/- per month + HRA as Admissible (JRF)
Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy, M.Sc. Biotechnology/Microbiology
Not more than 28 years for JRF

content_sections.heading: CSMCARI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSMCARI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSMCARI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSMCARI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Yoga Therapist: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognized University and two years' experience in Yoga Therapy in a reputed Institute/ Hospital OR Any Graduate from a recognized University established under UGC Act with diploma in Yoga after graduation of at least one-year duration from a recognized University/ Institute with 55% marks and practical experience in Yoga in a reputed Yoga Institute/ Hospital for a minimum period of five years. Level II (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB. Demonstration skills in Yogic practices, for which skill test will be conducted. JRF: M.Sc. Biotechnology/ Microbiology from a recognized University/ Institution.

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: CSMCARI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: JRF: Not more than 28 years (Age relaxation as per GOI rules). Yoga Therapist: Age limit not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: CSMCARI Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Yoga Therapist: Rs. 38000/- per month Consolidated JRF: Rs. 37000/- per month + HRA as Admissible.

content_sections.heading: CSMCARI Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written test Interview Skill test (for Yoga Therapist)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSMCARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Yoga Therapist?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Yoga Therapist position is scheduled for 09 July 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: For the JRF post, candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Biotechnology or Microbiology from a recognized University or Institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Therapist position?
faq.answer: The consolidated emoluments for the Yoga Therapist position are Rs. 38,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify an age limit for the Yoga Therapist post. However, for the JRF post, the maximum age is 28 years.

faq.question: Q5. What are the documents required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written test, an interview, and a skill test specifically for the Yoga Therapist position.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the Captain Srinivasamurthy Central Ayurveda Research Institute located?
faq.answer: The institute is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600106.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 02/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any application fees for these positions?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any of the posts.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies: 2 for Yoga Therapist and 1 for JRF.
